visual_differentiation_axes: circular perimeter dashboard instead of top-pill plus bottom-strip HUD
right-side sector rail with independent pressure states
scrap-console materials and welded hazard motifs within skin_post_apocalypse
full circular playfield framed by dead-space console edges rather than overlay chrome
icon built around a warning-lamp outpost ring under zombie pressure
forbidden_visual_reuse: top HUD pill cluster plus bottom command strip
reusing another zombie game's foreground object or background badge

ui_identity.layout_archetype: tactical perimeter dashboard with top resource spine, right-side sector focus rail, and bottom-left contextual build cluster
ui_identity.hud_composition: scrap fuel parts night counter objective breach alert selected sector integrity focus cooldown and four sector state cards
ui_identity.navigation_model: menu to zone select to blueprint bay to gameplay, with lightweight pause and result overlays and no full-screen interruption for normal gameplay commands
ui_identity.palette_signature: rust brown, soot black, oxidized steel, warning amber, acid green alert glow, pale sand text
ui_identity.material_language: welded scrap panels, hazard stripe trims, cracked meter glass, bolted edges, field-repaired industrial hardware
ui_identity.typography_style: condensed uppercase labels, heavy numeric counters, short industrial action words, high readability at small sizes
ui_identity.primary_ui_pack: skin_post_apocalypse token foundation with tracked scrap-command refinements
secondary_ui_assets: welded radial or cluster build buttons
resource glyphs for scrap fuel and parts

reserved_edges: top 11 percent for resources and objective
bottom-left 24 percent by 24 percent for contextual build controls
playfield_safety.frame_overlay_policy: all decorative scrap bezels and warning frames must remain in reserved dead space and may not overlap sector slots, breach gates, the circular ring, or emergency tap zones

unique_screen_motifs: menu background as animated perimeter schematic
sector cards styled as bolted yard plates
objective screen using hazard stencil headers
result panel framed as a breach report sheet
blueprint bay using module pegboard presentation
forbidden_ui_elements: full-width objective banner over the ring
plain blue-gray military tech preset reuse

icon_identity.subject: cartoon scrap barricade ring with one bright warning lamp and feral hands pressing in from outside the perimeter
icon_identity.silhouette: circular fortified yard with an offset lamp tower and outward-reaching zombie hands
icon_identity.composition: scrap barricade ring centered in the icon, warning lamp rising above one side, dark zombie hands pressing from the outer edge, and a lit inner yard core visible inside the ring
icon_identity.palette: rust orange, iron gray, hazard amber, acid green glow, dark shadowed hands
icon_identity.background: dirty metal dusk gradient or soot-tinted field with no generic shield medallion
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: the entire icon communicates a ring base barely holding against a zombie perimeter breach
forbidden_icon_reuse: unmodified icon reused from another project
